requirement: Phase 0.8a: venues config, tenant config API, tenant-aware securities-service, platform MCP tools

tasks.title: Venues config files + tenant config API
tasks.description:
Create the venues/ directory with per-tenant config files and add a config endpoint to platform-service.

Part A — Create venue config files:

venues/ace-commodities/config.json:
```json
{
  "tenant_id": "ace-commodities",
  "name": "ACE Commodity Exchange",
  "trading_calendar": {
    "timezone": "Asia/Ulaanbaatar",
    "trading_hours": {"open": "10:00", "close": "15:00"},
    "holidays": ["2026-01-01", "2026-02-10", "2026-02-11", "2026-07-11", "2026-07-12", "2026-07-13"]
  },
  "settlement": {"default_cycle": "T+0", "delivery": "physical"},
  "circuit_breakers": {"upper_limit_pct": 10.0, "lower_limit_pct": 10.0, "cooldown_minutes": 5},
  "compliance": {"kyc_required": true, "aml_screening": true},
  "features": {"short_selling": false, "auctions": false, "frc_reporting": false}
}
```

venues/mse-equities/config.json:
```json
{
  "tenant_id": "mse-equities",
  "name": "Mongolian Stock Exchange",
  "trading_calendar": {
    "timezone": "Asia/Ulaanbaatar",
    "trading_hours": {"open": "10:00", "close": "13:00"},
    "pre_open_auction": {"start": "09:30", "end": "10:00"},
    "closing_auction": {"start": "12:50", "end": "13:00"},
    "holidays": ["2026-01-01", "2026-02-10", "2026-02-11", "2026-07-11", "2026-07-12", "2026-07-13"]
  },
  "settlement": {"default_cycle": "T+2", "csd": "MCSD", "delivery": "book-entry"},
  "circuit_breakers": {"upper_limit_pct": 15.0, "lower_limit_pct": 15.0, "cooldown_minutes": 10},
  "compliance": {"kyc_required": true, "aml_screening": true, "frc_reporting": true},
  "features": {"short_selling": true, "auctions": true, "corporate_actions": true, "frc_reporting": true}
}
```

Part B — Add config endpoint to platform-service:
- Read .softhouse/handoff/T1.md from the Phase 0.7 run for platform-service context
- Read src/platform-service/internal/server/handlers.go for handler pattern
- Add GET /platform/v1/tenants/{id}/config handler that reads venues/{id}/config.json
- If file not found, return 404
- Add a TenantConfig loader in src/platform-service/internal/config/loader.go that reads JSON files from a configurable venues directory (default: ./venues/)
- Wire into server.go route registration

IMPORTANT: Go at /usr/local/go/bin/go. Run: export PATH=$PATH:/usr/local/go/bin && cd src/platform-service && go build ./...

Write handoff to .softhouse/handoff/T1.md

tasks.title: Tenant-aware securities-service (dynamic tenant from header)
tasks.description:
Update the securities-service to be fully tenant-aware — read tenant_id from X-GarudaX-Tenant header and use it dynamically.

Read src/securities-service/internal/server/server.go for current server setup.
Read src/securities-service/internal/kafka/topics.go for hardcoded ace-commodities topic names.
Read src/gateway/internal/middleware/tenant.go for the TenantMiddleware and TenantFromContext pattern.

Changes:

1. Add tenant middleware to securities-service (src/securities-service/internal/server/server.go):
   - Copy the same TenantMiddleware pattern from gateway (extract header, validate, store in context)
   - Valid tenants: read from VALID_TENANTS env var (comma-separated, default "ace-commodities,mse-equities")
   - Skip for /healthz, /readyz, /metrics

2. Update Kafka topic names to be dynamic (src/securities-service/internal/kafka/topics.go):
   - Change from constants to functions: TopicTradeExecuted(tenantID string) string { return tenantID + ".securities.trade.executed" }
   - Same for OrderCreated and OrderCancelled
   - Update wiring.go to pass tenant_id from context

3. Update engine to pass tenant context:
   - In handlers_order.go: extract tenant from context, pass to engine.MatchOrder
   - In engine.go: accept tenant_id parameter, pass to kafka publish calls
   - Keep store calls tenant-agnostic for now (in-memory store is single-tenant)

4. Update handlers to include tenant_id in responses:
   - All JSON responses should include "tenant_id" field

IMPORTANT: Go at /usr/local/go/bin/go. Run: export PATH=$PATH:/usr/local/go/bin && cd src/securities-service && go build ./... && go test ./...

Write handoff to .softhouse/handoff/T2.md

tasks.title: Platform MCP tools for admin-bot
tasks.description:
Add platform administration MCP tools to the admin-bot.

Read src/admin-bot/mcp-server/src/tools/securities.ts for the existing MCP tool pattern.
Read src/admin-bot/mcp-server/src/index.ts for tool registration.

Create src/admin-bot/mcp-server/src/tools/platform.ts:

1. list_tenants — GET /platform/v1/tenants
   Format as table: ID | Name | Status | Flagship | Tier

2. get_tenant — GET /platform/v1/tenants/{id}
   Params: tenant_id (required)

3. create_tenant — POST /platform/v1/tenants
   Params: id (slug), name, governance_tier (optional, default STANDARD)
   Returns tenant + provisioning result

4. update_tenant_status — PUT /platform/v1/tenants/{id}/status
   Params: tenant_id, status (ACTIVE/SUSPENDED/ONBOARDING)

5. get_tenant_config — GET /platform/v1/tenants/{id}/config
   Params: tenant_id
   Format config as readable YAML-like text

6. provision_tenant — POST /platform/v1/tenants/{id}/provision (if endpoint exists, else use create which auto-provisions)
   Params: tenant_id

Register in index.ts: import { registerPlatformTools } from './tools/platform.js'; registerPlatformTools(server, client);

Run: cd src/admin-bot/mcp-server && npx tsc --noEmit

Write handoff to .softhouse/handoff/T3.md

tasks.title: Verify all tests pass
tasks.description:
Run full test suite.

IMPORTANT: Go at /usr/local/go/bin/go — set PATH first.

1. cd src/platform-service && go test ./... -cover
2. cd src/securities-service && go test ./... -race -cover
3. cd src/gateway && go test ./...
4. cd src/admin-ui && npm test -- --run
5. cd src/admin-bot/mcp-server && npx tsc --noEmit
6. Verify venues/ config files are valid JSON
7. Report pass/fail per service

Write handoff to .softhouse/handoff/T4.md
